creator: bsd-unix@embarqmail.com
text:
I tried as you suggested with portupgrade-devel which already had
OPTIONS set:

  portupgrade -f portupgrade-devel-\*

and the OPTIONS screen did not redisplay.  I also tried a "make" in
port-mgmt/portupgrade-devel and again no screen displayed.  The
"make showconfig" shows my OPTIONS settings.  This is the behavior
that I would expect (running 6.2-PRERELEASE and portupgrade-devel).

Perhaps I misunderstood how to repeat but I don't see what
you're seeing.

Randy

--
